Calculation.Text:
Let ( [ textJSON = JSON.FilterByExpression ( HTMLeditor_json ; "JSONGetElement ($item ; \"id\") = " & textFieldId ); textString = JSONGetElement(textJSON ; "[0]value"); textString = Substitute(textstring ; ["---percent---"; "%"] ; ["---plus---"; "+"] ; ["---hash---"; "#"]; ["---and---"; "&"]; ["---equals---"; "="] ) ]; Case ( textString="


" Or textString = "
" Or textString = "
" ; "" ; textString ) )
